tasks.intent:
Log into PopYachts admin. Follow these steps precisely:

1. You are on https://admin.popyachts.com/
2. Look for 'Sign in with Google' button and click it
3. On the Google login page, click the email field
4. Type: svsg@popsells.com
5. Click 'Next'
6. Wait for the password page to load
7. Click the password field
8. Type: SelfService38#
9. Click 'Next'
10. If a 2FA/authenticator code is requested, call terminate('failure') with '2FA required'
11. Wait for redirect back to PopYachts admin dashboard
12. You should see the PopYachts admin panel

ONE login attempt only. Do NOT retry if it fails.
Call terminate('success') when you see the admin dashboard.

You are on PopYachts admin dashboard. Set up user impersonation:

1. Scroll DOWN the page — past all dashboard content
2. Look for a section labeled 'User Management'
3. IMPORTANT: Do NOT use the dropdown in the top-left corner of the page
4. In the User Management section, find the user dropdown/selector
5. Click it and select 'Erin NesSmith'
6. Wait for impersonation to activate
7. Now navigate to the lead entry form:
   Type https://admin.popyachts.com/Page/Account-Main-Seller-Lead-Review-External/NA/Page.html in the address bar
8. Wait for the form to load

Call terminate('success') when you see the lead entry form.

You are on the PopYachts lead entry form. Enter this boat lead:

- Year: 2022
- Make: Grady-White
- Model: Freedom 235
- Type: Center Console
- Asking Price: 145000
- Seller Name: John Smith
- Seller Phone: 305-555-9876
- Listing URL: https://www.boattrader.com/boat/2022-grady-white-freedom-235

1. If there's a lead type selector, select 'Outside Boat Lead'
2. Click each form field and type the corresponding value
3. Scroll through the form to find ALL fields
4. After filling everything, click Submit
5. Check if URL changed (success) or stayed same (failure)

Call terminate('success') if submitted, terminate('failure') if rejected.
